entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The host plant species being studied for resistance to the sorghum midge.

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The insect pest Stenodiplosis sorghicola that damages sorghum crops.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to limit damage caused by the sorghum midge.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: External climatic variables that influence the expression of resistance in sorghum.

entities.name: OPEN PAN EVAPORATION
entities.description: A measure of evaporation that influences the susceptibility of sorghum to midge damage.

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The highest daily temperature which affects resistance expression and grain growth.

entities.name: MINIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The lowest daily temperature which affects resistance expression and grain growth.

entities.name: SOLAR RADIATION
entities.description: The amount of solar energy reaching the plant, influencing midge susceptibility.

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: The amount of water vapor in the air, influencing midge damage and grain growth.

entities.name: SUNSHINE HOURS
entities.description: The duration of sunlight, which correlates with the level of midge damage.

entities.name: GRAIN GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of grain development after anthesis in sorghum.

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT OF THE GRAIN
entities.description: The water content within the sorghum grain.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of genetic makeup and environmental conditions on the expression of resistance.

relationships.description: Trait used to control the pest
Influence the expression of the trait
Negatively correlates with midge damage in certain genotypes
Positively correlates with midge damage in certain genotypes
Influences the rate of grain growth
Influences the rate of grain growth
Influences the rate of grain growth
Causes variation in the expression of resistance
Crop that exhibits the resistance trait
